contentBlocks.original:
आंजनेय मति पाटलाननं कांचनादि कमनीय विग्रहम् ।
पारिजात तरुमूलवासिनं भावयामि पवमान नंदनम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
āṃjaneya mati pāṭalānanaṃ kāṃcanādi kamanīya vigraham .
pārijāta tarumūlavāsinaṃ bhāvayāmi pavamāna naṃdanam ..
contentBlocks.translation: Anjaneya, with his deep reddish face, with graceful posture like a golden mountain, resident at the base of the Parijata tree, I pray with respect to that pleasing son of Vayu.
contentBlocks.meanings: आंजनेय (āñjaneya) – son of Anjana (añjana:Anjana | eya:son of); मति (mati) – intellect; पाटलाननं (pāṭalānanaṃ) – reddish face (pāṭala:reddish | ānanaṃ:face); कांचनादि (kāṃcanādi) – like a golden mountain (kāṃcana:golden | ādi:like); कमनीय (kamanīya) – graceful; विग्रहम् (vigraham) – form; पारिजात (pārijāta) – Parijata tree; तरुमूलवासिनं (tarumūlavāsinaṃ) – resident at the tree base (taru:tree | mūla:base | vāsinaṃ:resident); भावयामि (bhāvayāmi) – I pray; पवमान (pavamāna) – Vayu; नंदनम् (naṃdanam) – pleasing son (nanda:pleasing | nam:son);
